tools.name: humanLoops.deleteHumanLoop
tools.description:
Deletes the specified human loop for a flow definition.

If the human loop was deleted, this operation will return a ResourceNotFoundException.

tools.name: humanLoops.describeHumanLoop
tools.description: Returns information about the specified human loop. If the human loop was deleted, this operation will return a ResourceNotFoundException error.

tools.name: humanLoops.startHumanLoop
tools.description: Starts a human loop, provided that at least one activation condition is met.

tools.name: humanLoopsFlowDefinitionArn.listHumanLoops
tools.description: Returns information about human loops, given the specified parameters. If a human loop was deleted, it will not be included.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
